name: mathtalking
description: An agentic MCP for math and statistics graphing, computation, visualization, and validation. Plot functions, geometry, histograms, regression, and hypothesis tests. Returns interactive graph URLs with auto-computed results (roots, extrema, intersections, R², p-values). Results are graph-verified, not AI-generated. Saves ~410 tokens per render vs LLM canvas code.

tools.name: plot_graph
tools.description: Plot math functions, points, segments, labels, geometry, and shapes on an interactive graph. Auto-computes roots, extrema, and intersections for plotted functions.

tools.name: compute_stats
tools.description: Compute descriptive statistics (mean, median, std, quartiles) from raw data.

tools.name: add_histogram
tools.description: Create auto-binned histogram from raw data with visual bars.

tools.name: add_regression
tools.description: Fit regression model (linear, quadratic, exponential, power) to data points. Returns R².

tools.name: fit_distribution
tools.description: Fit normal, uniform, or exponential distribution to data. Returns best fit with parameters.

tools.name: test_hypothesis
tools.description: Run t-test, paired t-test, or one-sample t-test. Returns p-value with visual rejection region.

tools.name: create_show
tools.description: Bundle multiple plot_graph results into a slideshow. Returns URL to an interactive presentation with prev/next navigation.
